arts.ttl: Crystal Palace-Manchester City, le formazioni ufficiali della finale di FA Cup
arts.oTtl: News calcio e calciomercato | Alfredo Pedullà
arts.sum: CRYSTAL PALACE (3-4-2-1): Henderson; Richards, Lacroix, Guehi; Munoz, Wharton, Kamada, Mitchell; Sarr, Eze; Mateta. Allenatore: Oliver Glasner MANCHESTER CITY (4-2-3-1): Ortega: Akanji, Ruben Dias, Gvardiol, O’Reilly; Bernardo Silva, De Bruyne; Savinho, Marmoush, Doku; Haaland. Allenatore: Pep Guardiola Foto: Instagram FA Cup L'articolo Crystal Palace-Manchester City, le formazioni ufficiali della finale di FA Cup proviene da Alfredo Pedullà.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Manchester City - FA Cup Final: Live score, team news and updates as soaring Eagles take on last year's finalists
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of the FA Cup final for the latest score, team news and updates as Crystal Palace take on Manchester City inside Wembley Stadium.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Crystal Palace LIVE: FA Cup final team news and build-up from Wembley
arts.athr: Miguel Delaney,Richard Jolly and Chris Wilson
arts.sum: History is on the line as Crystal Palace look to win their first trophy at Wembley

arts.ttl: FA Cup final buildup to Crystal Palace v Manchester City – matchday live
arts.sum: All the buildup to the FA Cup final, 4.30pm kick-off Share your thoughts with matchday live or post BTL Kai Havertz, it seems, has been “destroying metrics” in the Arsenal gym. Jacob Steinberg reports on the forward’s rehabilitation from a hamstring injury: Continue reading...

arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU name the Crystal Palace team that stunned Man City in 2018? Or pick YOUR team and guess their starting XI
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!

arts.ttl: FA Cup Final prize money as Crystal Palace and Man City face Wembley showdown
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are looking to win their first FA Cup against Manchester City at Wembley today but the financial rewards on offer continue to pale compared to the Premier League and Champions League

arts.ttl: FA Cup final predictions made as Man City sent warning over Crystal Palace upset
arts.sum: FA CUP FINAL: Crystal Palace, who've never lifted a major trophy in their 119-year history, take on seven-time winners of the competition Manchester City at Wembley on Saturday

arts.ttl: Where can I watch Crystal Palace vs Man City FA Cup final? TV channels, live streams, kick-off time
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are set to take on Manchester City in the FA Cup final at Wembley Stadium, with hopes of lifting the title for the first-ever time in the club's 119-year history

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola dismisses FA Cup Final theory in honest verdict on Man City vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola dismissed the notion that winning the FA Cup would mean more to Crystal Palace – and said Manchester City are determined to leave Wembley with the famous trophy

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner to ditch lucky omen for Crystal Palace's FA Cup Final vs Man City
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has worn a black Hugo Boss jumper on their run to Crystal Palace's third FA Cup final - and Eagles fans will hope it will be third time lucky when they face Manchester City
